_comment: Community-driven trait rankings. Keyed by learned_id or 'name:XYZ' for traits without learned_id. Tier: S/A/B/F. Unranked = C. Source: docs/TRAITS-COMMUNITY.md

160081.note: Battle Hardened (Claw exclusive) — stacking crit/speed per melee hit, up to 5x

160611.note: Iron Body — immune to stagger when tenacity above 50%

160131.note: Iron Will (Flint exclusive) — 25% chance to resist stagger

160111.note: Blood Thirst — 25% chance to heal 30% of damage dealt

170521.note: Chain Dodge — immune to next hit after dodge

160461.note: Blood Bath Recovery — 20% chance when hit to regen HP for 15s

160351.note: Tactical Dodge — +30% move speed, +10% ATK, +30% ATK speed for 5s after dodge

160011.note: Last Light Revival — recover 20% HP in 5s when below 30%

160521.note: Insight Defense (Flint exclusive) — ignore defense for 7s after parry

150071.note: Gifted — +20% trigger chance for all proc-based traits (additive)

160021.note: Wild Awakening — +20% ATK, +20 STA/s below 30% HP, but -20% DEF

160531.note: Vengeful Rage — massive stat boost for 20s when ally dies within 10m

150091.note: Rapid Fire (Hunter exclusive) — bow full-charge time -55%

160431.note: Blood Absorption — steal HP on hit, enhanced vs bleeding targets

170061.note: Resilient Healing — constant HP regen above 70% HP

160581.note: Lethal Rhythm (Claw exclusive) — stacking ATK/speed when stamina above 70%

160651.note: Demoralize (Claw exclusive) — debuff enemy ATK/DEF/speed on hit

160551.note: Cruel Methods — debuff enemies on kill

160561.note: Slaughter Frenzy — stacking buffs on kills

160541.note: Kill Frenzy — damage immunity charge on nearby enemy death

130081.note: Tough Skin: Pierce Resist — -20% pierce damage

160291.note: Endurance — +80% DEF for 12s after blocking, no crits

160501.note: Endurance Burst (Flint exclusive) — stacking DEF on block, burst at 5 stacks

160061.note: Stress Acceleration — 20% chance for +30% move speed when attacked

160281.note: Heavy Charge — +40% move speed at 90%+ encumbrance

170081.note: Embers — survive 9 extra lethal hits in 12s

160151.note: Hardened Body — 20% chance to gain super armor when staggered

name:Slow Growth.note: Universally terrible — -20/60% XP gain, dramatically slows leveling

name:Born Unlucky.note: Universally terrible — -10/20/30% trigger chance for ALL other positive traits

name:Attack Weaken.note: Universally terrible — -3/6/9% ATK, direct combat nerf
